**What game do you want added**
Note: If the game does not already have support, I likely don't own it.

**What platform (i.e Steam, PS5/PS4), do you want support for the game on?**
Note: I only own a PC, so I might (in some cases) need assistance from someone with a console to get things such as hard coded keys.

**Please provide a save file for the game**
